lyrics:
\#Verse
Some walk with fire hidden low
A glow within, a pulse they know
It's not for show, it doesn't blind
But lights the edges of the mind
Others pass with empty gaze
Lost in noise and shadowed days
\#Pre-chorus
They've never burned, so never yearn
For embers they can't discern
\#Chorus
A candle deep
Light in eyes
What you see
They tantalize
If never had
Nor ever seen
No way to grasp
What might have been
A candle deep
\#Verse
Their hands reach out for plastic stars
While we trace constellations far
The weight of sight, the cost of knowing
The pull of tides forever flowing
Some hearts beat loud with questions asked
Some minds stay still in comfort masked
\#Pre-chorus
To worlds that spiral, never touch
One seeing all, one missing much
\#Chorus
A candle deep
Light in eyes
What you see
They tantalize
If never had
Nor ever seen
No way to grasp
What might have been
A candle deep
\#Bridge
Are those who see and strive to be
Better served than those made empty
When awareness brings its gravity
And ignorance its cavity
The growing possibility
A curse on all who ask... "Maybe?"
\#Chorus
A candle deep
Light in eyes
What you see
They tantalize
If never had
Nor ever seen
No way to grasp
What might have been
A candle deep
\#Outro
The light inside
Both gift and wound
A torch we bear
A weight assumed
And sometimes in the deepest night
We envy those without the sight
persona:
## 4Castle

The Future of Rock, The Power of Harmony

**4Castle **is a genre-defying, five-piece supergroup under Maricopa Records, built on a foundation of powerful vocal harmonies, intricate musicianship, and fearless innovation. Rooted in rock, but unbound by limitations, their music fuses elements of progressive rock, funk, Latin rhythms, blues, and folk, delivering a sound that is both technically complex and emotionally resonant.

### **A Band Like No Other**

Each member of **4Castle **brings a distinct voice-both musically and vocally-to the mix:
🎸 **Raven Cortez**(Lead Guitar, Vocals) – A fiery virtuoso with Latin and blues influences, weaving face-melting solos into every performance.
🎸 **Skylar “Sky” Monroe**(Rhythm Guitar, Vocals) – The poetic soul of the band, crafting melodic foundations and lyrically rich storytelling.
🎹 **Jonah Vega**(Keyboards, Vocals) – The sonic architect, layering psychedelic synths, Hammond organ swells, and cinematic orchestrations.
🎸 **Malcolm “Mack” Bishop**(Bass, Vocals) – The groove master, blending funk, jazz, and progressive rock into fluid, deep-pocket basslines.
🥁 **Eli “Fox” Foster **(Drums, Vocals) – The wild heartbeat, pushing the band forward with thunderous fills, polyrhythmic grooves, and explosive energy.

### **What Defines 4Castle?**

- **Multi-Layered Vocal Harmonies**– All five members **sing**, creating **rich, choral-like textures**that elevate every song.

- **Complex Arrangements & Bold Songwriting**– Each track is an **immersive journey**, balancing **technical mastery with raw emotion**.

- **Rhythmic Power & Innovation**– From **tight funk grooves to shifting time signatures**, their music **moves you-literally and figuratively**.

- **Lyrically Challenging Yet Accessible**– Their songs explore **deep themes of life, change, and resilience**, wrapped in **memorable hooks and melodies**.

### **4Castle’s Sound**

Imagine putting Emerson, Lake & Palmer, Heart, Led Zeppelin, Sly Stone, and Carlos Santana in a blender. The result? **4Castle**. Their music pays homage to the greats while pushing rock’s boundaries into the future.

### **Join the Journey**

With Maricopa Records, **4Castle **is set to redefine what a modern rock band can be. Expect genre-bending albums, electrifying performances, and music that resonates across generations.

🚀 Follow **4Castle **as they build their legacy-one song, one harmony, and one unforgettable moment at a time.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Cmxf7xuTHzf7UahMK2xJh)[](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/4castle/1801052673)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/5-rooks-in-a-dark-setting-1.png)
## Releases

impression.text: This is a high-energy, modern progressive metal track with a dense, layered texture that creates an epic and intense atmosphere. The production is polished and clean, establishing a wide stereo space where the powerful, soaring vocals sit clearly above the foundation of technical drumming and heavy, distorted guitars. The feel is consistently propulsive and forward-moving, defined by the dynamic contrast between intricate, complex verse riffing and the broader, anthemic melodic hooks of the chorus. A particularly distinctive moment is the virtuosic and emotionally charged guitar solo, which provides a technical and melodic peak for the entire arrangement.

review.review_text: In waltz time at 112 BPM, 'Light in Eyes' builds its central argument the way the best prog-rock hymns do: slowly, deliberately, until the weight of it lands. The lyric 'And sometimes in the deepest night / We envy those without the sight' reframes what first reads as a celebration of inner fire into something more honest and more earned, and 4Castle has the vocal firepower to carry that ambivalence without letting it collapse into mope. The guitar solo hits with the kind of emotionally weighted phrasing you get from David Gilmour on his better nights, technically capable but beholden to the song's mood rather than its own velocity. A highlight.
anchors_used: quoted lyric: 'And sometimes in the deepest night / We envy those without the sight'
